name: Tranche Agent
description: Autonomous agent that tranches a single user's SOL/USDC CLMM LP into a delta-neutral fixed-coupon senior sleeve and a levered-residual junior sleeve, hedged on Hyperliquid perps, with every rebalance decision logged on-chain.
note: Identity NFT + this registration file are minted once the Mantle ERC-8004 Identity Registry address is provided via hackathon onboarding. Fields marked <unset> are filled at mint time.
